originalTitle: Live Dev - PufferLib is Fixing Reinforcement Learning
title: Integrating GPU Drive Environment and Debugging PPG in PufferLib
summary: Integrated the GPU Drive environment into PufferLib, adjusted rendering colors and camera perspective, and fixed aliasing issues. Analyzed PPG algorithm results, discussing critic detachment and auxiliary updates. Helped a contributor debug a custom flocking environment. Also discussed new hyperparameter sets that generalize across environments.
